speaker: The Prosecutor
text: The defendant was caught stealing the royal pigeons! They claim they were just 'borrowing' them to start a feather collection.

speaker: The Judge
text: The accused has a history of 'misplacing' other people's gold. Should we enforce a strict curfew or let them work it off?

speaker: Detective
text: This suspect was found near the scene of the 'Great Jam Heist'. They have purple stains on their hands!

speaker: Chief Justice
text: The suspect claims they were just 'quality testing' the royal marmalade. A likely story!

speaker: Witness
text: I saw everything! The cat didn't knock over the vase, it was a gust of wind! (The witness is clearly three cats in a trench coat).

speaker: The Accused Witness
text: I testify that I am innocent of being a witness to my own crime! Wait, that's not right...

speaker: High Judge
text: The court is in disarray. Shall we call for a recess or push through to the final verdict?
